subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と小指に糸をかけて始めます。左手親指手前の糸を、右手親指と小指で取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with strings on the left thumb and little finger. With the right thumb and little finger, pick up the near left-thumb string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、反対の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up the palm strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指で、それぞれの手の中指の向こう側の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both ring fingers, pick up from below the far middle-finger strings on each hand.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対の手の中指腹側の糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up the palmar middle-finger strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 左手小指向こうの糸を親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: With the left thumb, pick up from below the far left little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 右手小指向こうの糸を親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: With the right thumb, pick up from below the far right little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の、上にかかっている糸を残したまま下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper thumb strings in place, release only the lower thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手を強く引いて中央の結び目を絞り、床に置いて完成です
subtitle.en: Pull the hands firmly to tighten the central knot, place it on the floor, and show the finished figure.
